description:
Create a channel named 'Document_Archive_Feed' that receives HL7 v2.x messages via a TCP Listener on port 6661 and archives them to /home/ga/archive_drop/. For each received message, the channel must generate two files: the raw HL7 message named 'adt-{MESSAGEID}.hl7' and an XML manifest named 'adt-{MESSAGEID}.xml'. The XML manifest must follow this structure:

<IndexEntry>
  <SourceSystem>NextGenConnect</SourceSystem>
  <PatientID>[Extract PID.3.1]</PatientID>
  <PatientName>[Extract PID.5.1 + space + PID.5.2]</PatientName>
  <EventDate>[Extract EVN.2 and convert to YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS]</EventDate>
  <OriginalFile>adt-{MESSAGEID}.hl7</OriginalFile>
</IndexEntry>

Ensure the HL7 timestamp from EVN.2 is converted to ISO 8601 format and the OriginalFile tag matches the HL7 filename exactly. The REST API is available at https://localhost:8443/api (admin/admin).
